description: Database schema for an application that provides AI services.

entities.purpose: Stores registered users and their basic information.

fields.name: createdDate
fields.description: Date and time when the record was created.

relationships.description: A user can have multiple orders. Access via 'u.orderList' in JPQL, e.g. JOIN u.orderList o.

entities.purpose: Represents transactions or orders created by users. Stores the amount paid by the customer.

fields.name: description
fields.description: Order name, details, or description (e.g., AI Image Generation).

fields.name: paidAmount
fields.description: Total amount paid by the customer for this order (Revenue).

fields.name: createdDate
fields.description: Date and time when the order was created.

relationships.description: The user who created the order. Access via 'o.user' in JPQL.

If the order has been processed, contains the backend AI resource usage and cost details. An order may not have a usage record. Access via 'o.orderUsageDetails' in JPQL, e.g. JOIN o.orderUsageDetails ou.

entities.purpose: Stores AI resource consumption and operational costs for successfully processed orders.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier of the usage record.

fields.name: usageDetails
fields.description: Resource consumption details (e.g., 10 GPU Credits, 500 Tokens).

fields.name: costPrice
fields.description: Direct operational cost incurred by the company for processing this order (Expense).

fields.name: createdDate
fields.description: Date and time when the usage record was created.

relationships.description: The order associated with this usage and cost record. Access via 'ou.order' in JPQL.
